parameters.jsCode:
const leads = $json.items;
return leads.map(l => ({ json: l }));

parameters.content:
If we want to send the link to all the comments who havenot recieved yet then ok. 

Otherwise if we want to check the intent of the conversation and make a decision whether to send or not then we will add an AI Agent here

parameters.jsCode:
return [
  {
    linkedin_id: $('For Each Lead').first().json.linkedin_id,
    Linkedin_Profile_ID: $('Extract LinkedIn IDs').first().json.linkedinId,
    profileUrl: $('For Each Lead').first().json.profileUrl,
    firstName: $('For Each Lead').first().json.firstName,
    lastName: $('For Each Lead').first().json.lastName,
    conversation: $input.first().json.output.conversation,
    commented: $input.first().json.output.commented
  }
]

parameters.content: We have to check from the list that if this profile has already applied or not. IF yes then skip. IF not then reply

{
  "linkedinUrl": "https://www.linkedin.com/in/ACoAADxhIPgBquQg_BTmVXRo99Ekm760TD6sZVw",
  "summary": "SEO and Digital Marketing Expert | LinkedIn Specialist | Driving Growth Through Proven Strategies",
  "about": "I’m Talha Hafeez, a results-oriented digital marketing professional based in Pakistan. With experience working with international clients, including EU Medstaff, Nehal Foods, and Swedish companies, I specialize in creating effective online strategies to help businesses grow.

What I Do
I provide services in Digital Marketing, SEO, Facebook Ads, Google Ads, LinkedIn Marketing, and Content Creation. Whether it’s enhancing a brand’s online presence, driving targeted traffic, or crafting compelling content, I customize my strategies to align with each client’s unique goals and needs.

Key Areas of Expertise
SEO: Optimizing websites to improve search engine rankings and drive organic traffic.
Google Ads & Facebook Ads: Designing and managing targeted ad campaigns that deliver measurable results.

LinkedIn Marketing: Helping professionals and businesses build their LinkedIn presence for better networking and lead generation.
Content Creation: Producing engaging and persuasive content that resonates with audiences and drives conversions.

Why Work With Me?
My approach is straightforward and results-driven. I focus on understanding your business and target audience to develop tailored strategies that achieve meaningful outcomes. Having worked with diverse clients, I bring valuable insights into global markets and the latest digital marketing trends.

Let’s connect to explore how I can help you grow your business, reach the right audience, and achieve your goals. Together, we can turn your vision into reality.
Gmail: talhadm&seo@gmail.com",
